metadata.description: Official PPTX automation libraries and accessibility guidance for slide decks.

python_libraries.name: python-pptx Documentation
python_libraries.relevance: Primary reference for creating and editing PowerPoint files in Python.

nodejs_libraries.name: PptxGenJS
nodejs_libraries.relevance: Primary reference for generating PowerPoint decks in Node.js.

nodejs_libraries.name: PPTX-Automizer
nodejs_libraries.relevance: Template-driven PPTX automation for Node.js. Design in PowerPoint, inject data programmatically.

quality_and_accessibility.name: Make your PowerPoint presentations accessible (Microsoft Support)
quality_and_accessibility.relevance: Baseline accessibility practices for PPTX: reading order, alt text, slide titles, and contrast.

quality_and_accessibility.name: Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.2 (W3C Recommendation)
quality_and_accessibility.relevance: Accessibility baseline that affects slide decks when distributed as web/PDF or used in enterprise contexts.

quality_and_accessibility.name: Office Open XML (ECMA-376)
quality_and_accessibility.relevance: Underlying standard behind .pptx; useful for interoperability and edge cases.

quality_and_accessibility.name: Microsoft Open Specifications (Office formats)
quality_and_accessibility.relevance: Reference entry point for Office Open XML and related Office format specifications.
